sentences.text: Thank you for calling Meridian management Group. If you know your party's extension please dial it now if not press two and for the staff directory in case of emergencies only including fire flood and other. Please dial the first few letters of the first or last name of the person you are trying to reach. Jane lieberman press one J shoe pressed. Please leave a message after the tone. When you are finished recording you may hang up or press pound for more options.

Hey, Jay, my name is Mitch Garcia. I'm calling with rental I sent you a couple emails and said that you got them and the reason for the call was to send meeting with you I work with a lot of other property management companies in terms of generating them more qualified leads renters to their property specifically to our partnership Facebook wanna run by a few option ideas with you if you please return my call again Mitch with renewal for seven zero eight two eight five three eight three again four seven zero eight two eight five three eight three thanks bye.
